headline: Why Is Cadence (CDNS) Down 5% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Cadence (CDNS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Flexcompute Launches PhotonForge Connector for Cadence Virtuoso Studio, Advancing Integrated Photonic Design Workflows for AI Data Centers
summary: Flexcompute, the physics company, announced the launch of the PhotonForge Connector for Cadence Virtuoso Studio, integrating its GPU-accelerated photonic simulation technology into the Cadence Electronic-Photonic Design Automation (EPDA) ecosystem. The connector enables engineers to move seamlessly between photonic layout and high-fidelity multiphysics simulation within a unified two-way workflow.
